title: Arrhenatherum capense
taxonomy: Arrhenatherum capense is classified as a species of grass within the genus Arrhenatherum and the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Pooideae and the tribe Poeae. intro: Arrhenatherum capense, also known as feather grass or red grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Arrhenatherum capense include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
